task_completion.description: Read the case numbers from the input text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window (e.g., using 'cat') or a text editor displaying the contents of '/home/ga/priority_audit_list.txt', which should contain three case numbers.

task_completion.description: Log into the ArkCase web application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser showing the ArkCase login screen being filled with credentials or the ArkCase dashboard indicating a successful login as 'arkcase-admin'.

task_completion.description: Look up the first case in ArkCase to find its title and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ArkCase web interface displaying search results or a case details page containing the title 'Environmental Impact Assessment - Project Alpha' and a 'High' priority.

task_completion.description: Look up the second case in ArkCase to find its title and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ArkCase web interface displaying search results or a case details page containing the title 'Budget Oversight Inquiry - Q3 2024' and a 'Medium' priority.

task_completion.description: Look up the third case in ArkCase to find its title and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ArkCase web interface displaying search results or a case details page containing the title 'Vendor Contract Dispute - Cleaning Services' and a 'Low' priority.

task_completion.description: Create the final CSV report with the correct header and case details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, spreadsheet app, or terminal command creating/saving '/home/ga/priority_report.csv'. The visible content must include the header 'Case Number,Title,Priority' followed by the three cases with their respective titles and priorities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with ArkCase.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window (like Chromium or Firefox) navigated to 'https://localhost:9443/arkcase' rather than terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually searched for or opened the cases in the ArkCase GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ArkCase search bar being used or individual case detail pages being viewed. The agent should not magically know the titles and priorities without viewing them.

integrity.description: Verify the agent properly formatted and saved the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like nano, gedit) or terminal echo/redirect commands actively writing the comma-separated values to '/home/ga/priority_report.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/priority_audit_list.txt'. The output file must be '/home/ga/priority_report.csv' with the exact header 'Case Number,Title,Priority'. The three cases to be found in ArkCase are: Case 1 Title: 'Environmental Impact Assessment - Project Alpha' (Priority: High), Case 2 Title: 'Budget Oversight Inquiry - Q3 2024' (Priority: Medium), Case 3 Title: 'Vendor Contract Dispute - Cleaning Services' (Priority: Low). Case numbers are generated dynamically and will be found in the input file.
